issues.description: Missing second action: 'trash 2 cards from your hand' (ForceDiscard). DSL only includes DrawCard but effect text requires both DrawCard and ForceDiscard.
Condition should be 'HasAttachedDon' (cost requirement, not trigger condition). 'HasRestingDon' is incorrect; '[DON!! x1]' indicates a cost, not a conditional effect.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] [When Attacking] Draw 2 cards and trash 2 cards from your hand.
